## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Testing

- [ ] New features and bug fixes include passing tests in `.spec.ts` files
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm run test:all` completes successfully)
- [ ] Tests cover both success and error scenarios

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (Biome formatted)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md` and/or `docs/`) if behaviour changed
- [ ] No breaking changes (or clearly documented above and reflected in `CHANGELOG.md` by a maintainer at release time)
